title: Shinjis sexuality
wikitext:
[]: Shinji's sexuality Post by oOoOoOo » Mon Oct 12, 2009 12:00 pm Merged/moved from NGE Ep.24 Script First and Second Drafts One of the most fascinating things about art is seeing the process between idea and product. Thanks for this, Lili-chan! I'm sorry I missed the epic birth of this thread. ^^; Also: DummyPlug, you should watch a show called "Neon Genesis Evangelion" and the ending film called "End of Evangelion". There are a few scenes where Shinji has hallucinogenic dreams featuring the three lead females naked. He even has dreamsex with one. Also: DummyPlug, you should become aquianted with social phobia, which is sort of kind of a big deal in Neon Genesis Evangelion, the TV series I mentioned earlier. Do not confuse fear with a lack of sexual interest. Also: DummyPlug, you should note that Shinji masturbates to orgasm after he exposes Asuka's chest. Asuka is a girl, and Shinji is a boy, so this makes it hard for him to be gay, because gay boys only like other boys. You haven't seen the show yet, so I'm sorry for spoiling it. Forgive me.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 12, 2009 12:39 pm oOoOoOo wrote: He even has dreamsex with more than one.

[]: Post by Legendary » Mon Oct 12, 2009 1:38 pm oOoOoOo wrote: BEING AWESOME

[]: Post by LiLi » Mon Oct 12, 2009 1:46 pm I'm really not comfortable with the pointless snark in this thread, but since I'm not a mod, nothing I can do about it, huh? Anyway, should anyone care to discuss the drafts, you know where to find the summaries/updates.

[]: Post by oOoOoOo » Mon Oct 12, 2009 1:58 pm Aw, thanks. ^^; Let's also not forget that it is possible that Shinji-kun might be bisexual. His feelings towards Kaworu, for instance, don't necessarily wash away his feelings for any of his female co-stars. What I think it interesting about these drafts is that it shows us more of Anno's ideas concerning these relationships, and these ideas can colour the way we look at the "official" output.

[]: Post by NemZ » Mon Oct 12, 2009 3:57 pm ^ I've said it before (somewhere around here... possibly earlier in this very thread ) that I always took Shinji to be at the very least questioning his sexuality as something other than 100% straight. Frankly, I don't see how it's possible to rationally argue he isn't somewhere in the bisexual range even without looking at these early drafts. Hell, that may even have been part of the implication intended when Asuka stated so acerbically in EoE that -anyone- would do for him. Her attentions were focused myopically on just him and Kaji, while both of them seemed to be (from her warped perspective) chasing almost everyone except her. GGSS wrote: Shinji/Asuka Relationship T&A on the Geektionary

[]: Post by oOoOoOo » Mon Oct 12, 2009 4:04 pm NemZ wrote: Hell, that may even have been part of the implication intended when Asuka stated so acerbically in EoE that -anyone- would do for him. Her attentions were focused myopically on just him and Kaji, while both of them seemed to be (from her warped perspective) chasing almost everyone except her.

[]: Post by Alaska Slim » Mon Oct 12, 2009 4:28 pm DummyPlug wrote: No, I thought he was gay because he had all those chances to get laid (with the opposite sex) and never made a move... he did exactly the opposite. Now I understand why Asuka was so mad after the kiss! She realised he was gay. I know the whole "you won't even hold me" thing, but maybe she realised that he didn't do it because he wasn't aroused at all.

[]: Post by oOoOoOo » Mon Oct 12, 2009 5:12 pm Well, now I'm curious.

[]: Post by Synapsid » Mon Oct 12, 2009 6:14 pm I think Alaska has been trolled And I do have actual replies, just give me a second to finish them.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Mon Oct 12, 2009 6:15 pm Synapsid wrote: I think Alaska has been trolled And I do have actual replies, just give me a second to finish them.

[]: Post by Synapsid » Mon Oct 12, 2009 7:36 pm esselfortium wrote: I think it may, in fact, be you who has been trolled if you think that "OH NO, NO, NO, DUDE, DUDE! SHUT UP ! You're going to summon him " in any way resembles a seriouspost.

[]: Post by Alaska Slim » Mon Oct 12, 2009 9:50 pm esselfortium wrote: I think it may, in fact, be you who has been trolled if you think that "OH NO, NO, NO, DUDE, DUDE! SHUT UP ! You're going to summon him " in any way resembles a seriouspost.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Oct 13, 2009 1:30 am Alaska Slim wrote: the moment I say it, it's like it pops up in the search results of some God-forsaken search engine he's constantly using and then decides to pay a visit .

[]: Post by esselfortium » Tue Oct 13, 2009 1:48 am Mr. Tines wrote: sexual issues themselves played little, if any, part. They were not even mentioned, Shinji focused instead on his platonic issues, any romance to anyone was beside the point as basic interactions with others alone was a centerpoint of his psychoanalysis.

[]: Post by Synapsid » Tue Oct 13, 2009 1:50 am CATO wrote: And I don't get the whole girly Shinji thing. Perhaps I'm influenced by my european context and identification, but to me Shinji is primarily a character with a masculine mind (he's not a transexual). Gay, Bi? Perhaps. And adolescent who's not so sure and is attracted by anyone?

[]: Post by Alaska Slim » Tue Oct 13, 2009 3:32 am Mr. Tines wrote: sexual issues themselves played little, if any, part. They were not even mentioned, Shinji focused instead on his platonic issues, any romance to anyone was beside the point as basic interactions with others alone was a centerpoint of his psychoanalysis.

[]: Post by Synapsid » Tue Oct 13, 2009 10:24 am Alaska Slim wrote: ... I don't get it, it's like you're talking to me , but you're also referring to me in the 3rd person, get your POVs straight!

[]: Post by DummyPlug » Tue Oct 13, 2009 11:05 am oOoOoOo wrote: One of the most fascinating things about art is seeing the process between idea and product. Thanks for this, Lili-chan! I'm sorry I missed the epic birth of this thread. ^^; Also: DummyPlug, you should watch a show called "Neon Genesis Evangelion" and the ending film called "End of Evangelion". There are a few scenes where Shinji has hallucinogenic dreams featuring the three lead females naked. He even has dreamsex with one. Also: DummyPlug, you should become aquianted with social phobia, which is sort of kind of a big deal in Neon Genesis Evangelion, the TV series I mentioned earlier. Do not confuse fear with a lack of sexual interest. Also: DummyPlug, you should note that Shinji masturbates to orgasm after he exposes Asuka's chest. Asuka is a girl, and Shinji is a boy, so this makes it hard for him to be gay, because gay boys only like other boys. You haven't seen the show yet, so I'm sorry for spoiling it. Forgive me.
